songs.title: Can't Keep My Hands Off You (feat. Rivers Cuomo)
feed: “Can't Keep My Hands Off You (feat. Rivers Cuomo)” by Simple Plan spends a 2nd week at #1 in the Personal Hot 100.
“Can't Keep My Hands Off You (feat. Rivers Cuomo)” by Simple Plan is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 16,280 sales units.
“Can't Keep My Hands Off You (feat. Rivers Cuomo)” by Simple Plan is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 93,093,000 streams units.
“Can't Keep My Hands Off You (feat. Rivers Cuomo)” by Simple Plan is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 457,625 total units.
